chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1517 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.10.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General along with Faheem Ahmed Memon, Senior Auditor, on behalf of District Accounts Officer Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The statement / compliance report along with photo copies of cheques has been submitted on behalf of District Accounts Officer, same is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the petitioner. Further, Senior Auditor, who is present and undertakes that the amount of the petitioner will be deposited in his subject account till this Monday i.e 27.10.2025. On such undertaking, petitioner satisfied and does not press the instant petition. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. The District Accounts Officer Sukkur is directed to comply with the undertaking and in case of failure, the contempt proceedings shall be initiated against him. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
